/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -Wl,-gc-sections,--print-memory-usage,-Map=/home/afonsom/Github/py32-vscode-cmake/py32app.map -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-m0plus -mfloat-abi=soft -specs=nano.specs -T/home/afonsom/Github/py32-vscode-cmake/Libs/Libraries/LDScripts/py32f002ax5.ld CMakeFiles/py32app.elf.dir/Libs/Libraries/CMSIS/Device/PY32F0xx/Source/system_py32f0xx.c.obj -lnosys
